task: Find the top posts from last year on 9GAG.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task by navigating to 9GAG, opening the Top section, selecting the 'Last Year' timeframe, and reaching the page titled 'Best Memes of the Last Year - 9GAG'. The page snapshot visibly showed the top posts, including the first two entries and their counts. The agent then used an in-page browser-context fetch to the site's own endpoint '/v1/group-posts/type/top/timeframe/last-year', which returned JSON with the top 10 posts, titles, URLs, upvote counts, and comment counts. The final answer accurately summarized those top posts from last year on 9GAG.
final_result_response:
I found 9GAG’s **Best Memes of the Last Year** list and extracted the first 10 posts shown in its top-last-year feed:

| # | Post | Cheers | Comments |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| 1 | [THIS IS MY LAST POST! SEE YOU IN THE NEXT LIFE](https://9gag.com/gag/awyQBMx) | 48.2K | 3.2K |
| 2 | [Repost because it worked. I want you all to have good luck! Don't ignore!](https://9gag.com/gag/aPA3wpR) | 42.1K | 197 |
| 3 | [I'm sorry but it's true](https://9gag.com/gag/aPARGmV) | 42.7K | 357 |
| 4 | [It has started...degenerates gatheing](https://9gag.com/gag/aVvDBAn) | 34.5K | 1.9K |
| 5 | [I'm sorry but it's true](https://9gag.com/gag/aGynMA0) | 33.4K | 263 |
| 6 | [Wife going to be operated for Brain tumour in 6 hrs, life changing night for me. Wish us luck!](https://9gag.com/gag/aByw5DZ) | 29.8K | 2.2K |
| 7 | [Skills in PowerPoint](https://9gag.com/gag/avy8mN5) | 28.8K | 374 |
| 8 | [Let's test if 9gag really has free speech](https://9gag.com/gag/aByyDxP) | 28.0K | 1.1K |
| 9 | [Now thats a gender equality](https://9gag.com/gag/a87q0nO) | 27.6K | 1.7K |
| 10 | [I didn't know but now I know, and you know too.](https://9gag.com/gag/aE08VPM) | 26.9K | 651 |

Note: 9GAG’s direct endpoint was Cloudflare-blocked outside the page, so I used the loaded 9GAG page’s browser session to read the top-last-year feed.
